description_long: This is a heavily armored tracked combat vehicle resembling a World War II-era German Tiger I tank. The vehicle features a large, cylindrical turret mounted centrally with a long-barreled main cannon extending forward. The hull is robust, with thick, angular armor plating covering the front, sides, and rear, and prominent track guards running along both sides. The tracks are wide and reinforced, designed for traversing rough terrain, and the vehicle includes various hatches, periscopes, and a visible antenna on the turret. The exterior is finished in a metallic bronze color, with no visible camouflage or military markings. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and battlefield durability.
description: A bronze-colored, heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a large turret and long cannon, resembling a Tiger I tank. Features thick armor, wide tracks, and a prominent antenna.
description_view_0: Front view shows the thick frontal armor, central main cannon, and wide tracks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the cannon, turret details, and track system.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, engine deck, and rear track structure.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the turret, cannon, and right track assembly.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the central turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular steel armor plating; sloped front and side panels; reinforced turret and hull.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid metallic bronze color.
